word: G679 - ἄπταιστος - áptaistos - ap-tah'-ee-stos - From falling

sections.paragraph: இலக்கண சொல்வகை / Part(s) of speech: Adjective / பெயரடை
not stumbling, standing firm, exempt from falling
ஆங்கில மூலம் / Original in English: From G1 (as a negative particle) and a derivative of G4417; not stumbling, that is, (figuratively) without sin: - from falling.
